title: GoCell Cell Descriptor
description: Defines a Cell, the governance partition in the GoCell architecture. A Cell is either an L1+ runtime boundary with data sovereignty, or an L0 pure-computation partition.

id.description: Unique cell identifier. Must equal the directory name under cells/.

type.description: Cell sub-type that determines governance rules.

consistencyLevel.description: Maximum consistency level this cell operates at.

owner.description: Team and role responsible for the cell.

schema.description: Database schema ownership. The primary field is optional for L0 cells.

primary.description: Primary database schema name owned by this cell.

smoke.description: Smoke test identifiers executed by verify-cell.

durabilityMode.description: Outbox durability mode for L2+ cells. Declared so CheckNotNoop can enforce at runtime.

l0Dependencies.description: Explicit L0 Cell import dependencies. Only declared when importing L0 (pure-computation) cells within the same assembly.

cell.description: The L0 cell id being imported.
